_comment: Host-element native attribute capability map for RENDER-PROP-BINDING-BLAST-RADIUS-01. Maps an HTML tag (anatomy.dom.tag) to the native attributes it accepts. Used ONLY to classify a designed prop that has NO other declared realization (not in anatomy.dom bindings/content/events, not a channel/variant, not a node/callback propType): if the prop name is a native attribute of the host tag, its render obligation is native-attr and it is EXPECTED to bind. This is the host-capability rule the audit keys on instead of component-name lore. Lives under fixtures/ so it is reference data, not strike-eligible source. Lists are conservative high-signal form/interactive/media attributes; not exhaustive global attrs.
label: for
